data.title: Virtuix integrates Omni One into Marine Corps FARP trainer; secures 26th U.S. patent
data.description:
Virtuix integrated its Omni One into a U.S. Marine Corps FARP training simulator and received a Notice of Allowance for its 26th U.S. patent.

Key Highlights:

  • Omni One integrated into Vigilante’s FARP simulator for evaluation by U.S. Marine Corps TECOM, adding natural full-body movement.
  • Integration enables trainees to physically walk, maneuver and build muscle memory for refueling and rearming operations under realistic conditions.
  • Partnership builds on recent Omni One deliveries to Marine Corps TECOM, plus deployments to U.S. Army and Air Force and a Navy development agreement.
  • USPTO issued a Notice of Allowance for Virtuix’s 26th U.S. patent covering mechanical design of the latest Omni One treadmill.
  • Patent portfolio now totals 26 granted U.S. patents with five pending, strengthening IP moat across gaming, enterprise and defense markets.

Original SEC Filing: Virtuix Holdings Inc. [ VTIX ] - 8-K - Apr. 30, 2026

Disclaimer
This is an AI-powered summary. It may contain inaccuracies. Consider verifying important information with the source. Please note this summary is solely based on documents filed with the SEC.

data.title: Sonoma Pharmaceuticals Prices $1.35 Unit Offering, Nets ~$3.5M Under Underwriting With Dawson James
data.description:
Sonoma Pharmaceuticals entered into an underwriting agreement with Dawson James Securities to complete a public offering of 2,962,962 units at $1.35 per unit. The underwriter's 45-day over-allotment option was fully exercised, and the offering closed April 27–28, 2026. Sonoma sold 1,650,716 common shares, 1,312,247 pre-funded warrants, and 3,407,404 common warrants, yielding approximately $3.5 million in net proceeds. The company also signed warrant agency agreements with Computershare and Computershare Trust Company to administer the offering's pre-funded and common warrants.

Agreement 1: Sonoma Pharmaceuticals Prices $1.35 Unit Offering, Nets ~$3.5M Under Underwriting With Dawson James

  • Agreement type: Underwriting agreement for public equity offering
  • Counterparty: Dawson James Securities
  • Signed / Effective: Apr 24 2026 / Apr 24 2026
  • Duration / Termination: Offering period; 45-day over-allotment; 90-day lock-up
  • Reason: Raise equity capital and enhance liquidity

Agreement 2: Sonoma Pharmaceuticals Appoints Computershare as Warrant Agent for Offering Warrants

  • Agreement type: Warrant agency agreements for pre-funded and common warrants
  • Counterparty: Computershare; Computershare Trust Company
  • Signed / Effective: Apr 28 2026 / Apr 28 2026
  • Duration / Termination: Through warrant expirations (up to 5 years)
  • Reason: Administer warrant issuance and exercises from the offering

Original SEC Filing: Sonoma Pharmaceuticals, Inc. [ SNOA ] - 8-K - Apr. 30, 2026

Disclaimer

data.title: Sadot Group regains Nasdaq compliance after filing 2025 Form 10-K
data.description:
Sadot Group regained compliance with Nasdaq listing rules after filing its 2025 Form 10-K.

Key Highlights:

  • Nasdaq notified Sadot Group April 17 it was not meeting Rule 5250(c)(1) periodic filing requirements.
  • Sadot Group filed its Annual Report on Form 10-K for year ended Dec 31, 2025 on April 29, 2026.
  • On April 30, Nasdaq confirmed the Company now complies with Rule 5250(c)(1) and closed the matter.

Original SEC Filing: Sadot Group Inc. [ SDOT ] - 8-K - Apr. 30, 2026

data.title: NorthEast Community Bancorp reports Q1 net income $9.95M, EPS $0.74 diluted
data.description:
NorthEast Community Bancorp reported first-quarter 2026 net income of $9.95 million, or $0.76 per basic share and $0.74 per diluted share, compared with $10.57 million, or $0.80 basic and $0.78 diluted, in Q1 2025. Total net interest income was $24.13 million and net interest margin was 4.99% for the quarter. Total assets were $2.025 billion and total stockholders’ equity rose to $356.3 million as of March 31, 2026.

Financial Highlights

  • Net income: $9,952,000 for the quarter ended March 31, 2026 (Q1 2025: $10,567,000).
  • Earnings per share: Basic $0.76; Diluted $0.74 for Q1 2026 (Q1 2025: basic $0.80; diluted $0.78).
  • Net interest income: $24,134,000 for Q1 2026 (Q1 2025: $24,264,000); net interest margin 4.99% (Q1 2025: 5.11%).
  • Total assets: $2,025,127,000 at March 31, 2026 (December 31, 2025: $2,063,508,000); total stockholders’ equity: $356,285,000 (December 31, 2025: $351,700,000).
  • Provision for income taxes: $4,099,000 for Q1 2026; provision for credit losses: $0 for Q1 2026 (Q1 2025 credit loss expense: $237,000).

Business Highlights

  • Construction lending focus: originated $266.1 million of loans during Q1 2026, including $244.2 million in construction loans (40.7% of those construction loan funds disbursed at closing).
  • Construction loan commitments and loans-in-process outstanding increased ~37.8% year-over-year, with over $819 million in unfunded loan commitments at March 31, 2026 (20.6% higher than December 31, 2025).
  • Loan portfolio movement: net loans decreased $31.8 million sequentially driven by pay-downs and project completions across construction and multi-family segments.
  • Deposit mix shift: total deposits increased $9.4 million; NOW/money market accounts grew by $50.0 million and non-interest bearing deposits rose $25.0 million, while certificates of deposit declined $57.1 million as management reduced higher-cost brokered and listing-service CDs.
  • Capital and liquidity: strong regulatory capital metrics (tier 1 leverage 16.76%, total risk-based capital 15.73%) and available borrowing capacity from Federal Reserve and correspondent bank sources.

Original SEC Filing: NorthEast Community Bancorp, Inc./MD/ [ NECB ] - 8-K - Apr. 30, 2026

Disclaimer
This is an AI-powered summary. It may contain inaccuracies. Consider verifying important information with the source. Please note this summary is solely based on documents filed with the SEC.

data.title: Civista Bancshares to Present Q1 2026 Results at D.A. Davidson Conference; NII, Assets, ROAE Improved
data.description:
Civista Bancshares announced participation at the D.A. Davidson Financial Institutions Conference and furnished its Q1 2026 investor presentation highlighting record net interest income and stronger capital metrics.

Key Highlights:

  • Executive team to meet investors at D.A. Davidson conference May 4–6; Q1 2026 presentation furnished as Exhibit 99.1.
  • Q1 2026 net interest income of $37.8M, NIM 3.85% (+34 bps YoY), net income $15.0M (+47% YoY).
  • Total assets $4.30B, total deposits $3.50B, gross loans & leases $3.23B as of 1Q 2026.
  • Tangible book value per share $19.70 (up $2.66 YoY); price/TBV 1.16x and dividend yield 3.16%.
  • Completed recent acquisitions (FSB) adding ~$268M assets; disciplined M&A and capital flexibility highlighted.

Original SEC Filing: CIVISTA BANCSHARES, INC. [ CIVB ] - 8-K - Apr. 30, 2026

data.title: NMI Holdings Inc reports results for the quarter ended March 31 - Earnings Summary
data.description:
• NMI Holdings Inc reported quarterly adjusted earnings of $1.28​​ per share for the quarter ended March 31, identical to the same quarter last year. The mean expectation of seven analysts for the quarter was for earnings of $1.23 per share. Wall Street expected results to range from $1.19 to $1.28 per share.

  • Revenue rose 3.6% to $154.81 million from a year ago; analysts expected $154.33 million.

  • NMI Holdings Inc's reported EPS for the quarter was $1.28​.

  • The company reported quarterly net income of $99.33 million.

  • NMI Holdings Inc shares had risen by 9.6% this quarter and gained 0.8% so far this year.

FORECAST CHANGES

  • The mean earnings estimate of analysts had fallen by about 0.8% in the last three months.​

  • In the last 30 days, there have been no negative revisions of earnings estimates

RECOMMENDATIONS

  • The current average analyst rating on the shares is "buy" and the breakdown of recommendations is 4 "strong buy" or "buy," 2 "hold" and no "sell" or "strong sell." The average consensus recommendation for the property & casualty insurance peer group is also "buy"

  • Wall Street's median 12-month price target for NMI Holdings Inc is $47.00, about 12.5% above its last closing price of $41.12

data.title: Cypher Announces Closing of Financing
data.description:
NOT FOR DISTRIBUTION TO UNITED STATES NEWSWIRE SERVICES OR FOR DISSEMINATION IN THE UNITED STATES

VANCOUVER, BC / ACCESS Newswire / April 30, 2026 / Cypher Metaverse Inc. (CSE:CODE) ("Cypher" or the "Company") is pleased to announce that it has closed its previously announced private placement ("Private Placement"). The Company accepted subscriptions totaling 861,815 units at a price of $0.33 per unit, for gross proceeds of $284,399.

Each unit consists of one common share and one common share warrant. Each warrant entitles the holder to subscribe for one additional common share for a period of 2 years from the date of closing, at an exercise price of $0.45, subject to the Corporation's option to accelerate the expiry date if the stock trades for 10 consecutive trading days at $0.65 per common share.

The Common Shares and Warrants comprising the Units are subject to a four-month and one day hold period in accordance with the policies of the Canadian Securities Exchange and applicable securities legislation.

Proceeds will be used for general corporate purposes as the Company works to complete its previously announced acquisition of Noninvasix Inc.

The Company paid finder's fees to qualified finders of $19,847.82 and issued 60,145 broker warrants. The broker warrants are exercisable for 2 years and have an exercise price of $0.45, subject to the Corporation's option to accelerate the expiry date if the stock trades for 10 consecutive trading days at $0.65 per common share.

For further information please contact:

Cypher Metaverse Inc.

George Tsafalas - Director

Phone: Toll-Free 1 (778) 373-8578

Neither the CSE nor its Regulation Services Provider (as that term is defined in policies of the CSE) accepts responsibility for the adequacy or accuracy of this press release.

Forward-Looking Statements

This news release contains "forward-looking information" within the meaning of applicable securities laws. Although Cypher believes in light of the experience of its officers and directors, current conditions and expected future developments and other factors that have been considered appropriate that the expectations reflected in this forward-looking information are reasonable, undue reliance should not be placed on them because Cypher can give no assurance that they will prove to be correct. Readers are cautioned to not place undue reliance on forward-looking information. Actual results and developments may differ materially from those contemplated by these statements depending on. The statements in this press release are made as of the date of this press release. Cypher undertakes no obligation to comment on analyses, expectations or statements made by third-parties in respect of Cypher, except as required by securities laws.

SOURCE: Cypher Metaverse Inc.

View the original press release on ACCESS Newswire

data.title: Atkore Inc. Declares Quarterly Dividend
data.description:
HARVEY, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--April 30, 2026--

The Board of Directors of Atkore Inc. (the "Company") , a leading manufacturer of electrical products for commercial, industrial, data center, and solar applications, today declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.33 per share of common stock payable on May 29, 2026, to stockholders of record on May 19, 2026.

About Atkore Inc.

Atkore is a leading manufacturer of electrical products for commercial, industrial, data center, and solar applications. With 5,400 employees and $2.9B in sales in fiscal year 2025, we deliver sustainable solutions to meet the growing demands of electrification and digital transformation. To learn more, please visit www.atkore.com.

Dissemination of Company Information

Atkore intends to make future announcements regarding company developments and financial performance through its website, www.atkore.com, as well as through press releases, filings with the Securities and Exchange Commission, conference calls, media broadcasts, and webcasts.

View source version on businesswire.com: https://www.businesswire.com/news/home/20260430498393/en/
